# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Everything you need to know about this project's specific rules, toolchain, and coding standards is defined in the following file:

@AGENTS.md

Please refer to AGENTS.md for:
- Assembler syntax (LWASM)
- BIOS routines (Wait_Recal, etc.)
- Project structure and Makefile commands
- Coding style (PascalCase, comments)

Always follow the instructions in AGENTS.md before generating any Vectrex assembly code.
